migration-v18.description: Migrate @angular-builders/jest from v17 to v18: switch to jest-preset-angular/setup-jest

migration-v19.description: Migrate @angular-builders/jest from v18 to v19: use explicit setupZoneTestEnv() from jest-preset-angular/setup-env/zone

migration-v20.description: Migrate @angular-builders/jest from v19 to v20: no breaking changes (no-op migration)

migration-v21.description: Migrate @angular-builders/jest from v20 to v21: zoneless as default, reduced global mocks
